StatDamage reduction

Eligible levels18-150
Approx. type odds0.57%among eligible artifact types

How To Use It

Damage reduction is the readable effect family. The value range applies the same display multipliers used by the game artifact tooltip, so it is easier to compare with in-game rolls.

Recycles Into

MaterialQty
Core Charge1-2
Big Metal Scrap1-2
